mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_approval_workflow ( workflow_type, workflow_title, organ_id, organ_name, request_data, current_step, total_steps, status, requester_id, requester_name, requester_comment, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{workflowType}, #{workflowTitle}, #{organId}, #{organName}, #{requestData}, COALESCE(#{currentStep}, 1), COALESCE(#{totalSteps}, 1), COALESCE(#{status}, 0), #{requesterId}, #{requesterName}, #{requesterComment}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_approval_workflow
workflow_title = #{workflowTitle}, request_data = #{requestData}, current_step = #{currentStep}, status = #{status}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_approval_workflow SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_approval_workflow WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE node_approval_workflow SET status = #{status}, final_approver_id = #{finalApproverId}, final_approver_name = #{finalApproverName}, final_comment = #{finalComment}, approved_at = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_approval_workflow SET current_step = #{currentStep}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_approval_workflow WHERE status = 0 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date ASC

SELECT w.* FROM node_approval_workflow w INNER JOIN node_approval_step s ON w.id = s.workflow_id WHERE w.status = 0 AND s.status = 0 AND s.approver_id = #{userId} AND w.is_del = 0 AND s.is_del = 0 ORDER BY w.create_date ASC
SELECT * FROM node_approval_workflow WHERE requester_id = #{requesterId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE node_approval_workflow SET status = 3, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_approval_step ( workflow_id, step_number, step_name, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, status, comment, attachments, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{workflowId}, #{stepNumber}, #{stepName}, #{approverId}, #{approverName}, #{approverRole}, COALESCE(#{status}, 0), #{comment}, #{attachments}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO node_approval_step ( workflow_id, step_number, step_name, approver_id, approver_name, approver_role, status, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES
(#{step.workflowId}, #{step.stepNumber}, #{step.stepName}, #{step.approverId}, #{step.approverName}, #{step.approverRole}, COALESCE(#{step.status}, 0), 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_approval_step
step_name = #{stepName}, approver_id = #{approverId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, attachments = #{attachments}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_approval_step SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_approval_step WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM node_approval_step WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY step_number ASC
SELECT * FROM node_approval_step WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId} AND step_number = #{stepNumber} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE node_approval_step SET status = #{status}, comment = #{comment}, approved_at = NOW(), update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_approval_step SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE workflow_id = #{workflowId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_approval_config ( workflow_type, is_enabled, steps_count, auto_approve_rules, notification_enabled, notification_emails, is_del, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{workflowType}, COALESCE(#{isEnabled}, 1), COALESCE(#{stepsCount}, 1), #{autoApproveRules}, COALESCE(#{notificationEnabled}, 1), #{notificationEmails}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_approval_config
is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, steps_count = #{stepsCount}, auto_approve_rules = #{autoApproveRules}, notification_enabled = #{notificationEnabled}, notification_emails = #{notificationEmails}, update_date = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_approval_config SET is_del = 1, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_approval_config WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM node_approval_config WHERE workflow_type = #{workflowType} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM node_approval_config WHERE is_del = 0 ORDER BY workflow_type
mapper.update: UPDATE node_approval_config SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_date = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_approval_config WHERE is_enabled = 1 AND is_del = 0
